subject: Design: TUI interaction patterns
description:
Design TUI user experience for interactive prompts.

Dependencies: Task 4 complete (analysis done)

Design questions:
1. How to display AskUserQuestion prompts? (overlay, inline, panel)
2. How to show plan approval? (split view, popup, dedicated screen)
3. Keyboard shortcuts for responses (1-4 for options, Y/N, etc.)
4. Visual indicators for awaiting state
5. How to prevent other input during prompt?
6. Accessibility considerations

Deliverable:
- UI mockups (ASCII art or descriptions)
- Keyboard shortcut map
- State indicator designs
- Input blocking strategy
- Lipgloss styling specifications

Acceptance:
- [ ] UI patterns designed for each prompt type
- [ ] Keyboard shortcuts defined
- [ ] Visual indicators specified
- [ ] Input blocking strategy defined
- [ ] Accessibility considered
